category_sources: source_facts.description says this is a CLI for interacting with Doppler secrets and configuration.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is doppler; official Doppler CLI guide identifies the CLI product.
docs_sources: Official Doppler documentation has a dedicated CLI guide.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/DopplerHQ/cli, so repo lookup was intentionally skipped.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official Doppler CLI documentation support secrets, configuration, environment variables, and CLI tags.
